name: Crustless Pumpkin Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine pumpkin and evaporated milk.
2. Add eggs and egg whites to the mixture. Beat until well blended and smooth.
3. Mix in sugar, cinnamon, allspice, ginger, and salt. Stir thoroughly.
4. Fold in crumbs or wafers until evenly distributed.
5. Spray a 9-inch pie plate with nonstick cooking spray.
6. Pour the filling into the prepared pie plate.
7. Preheat oven to 325°F (165°C).
8. Bake for 45-55 minutes, or until a knife inserted near the center comes out clean.
9. Remove from oven and let cool on a wire rack.
10. Refrigerate overnight.
11. Cut into wedges and serve with a small dollop of whipped cream.
Nutrients per serving: calories 166, protein 5g, carbohydrates 27g, total fat 9g (saturated fat 5g), dietary fiber 1 g, cholesterol 70mg, sodium 125mg.
